Appearances:
Dana Alkalas, property manager, appearing for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
John P. Zanghi representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Stanley Edwards is present.
Gerald Hall representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. JPT, counsel and parties meet privately for settlement discussions.

Case has settled, stipulation and judgment filed by the clerk, trial date is off calendar.
